case_title: GANNON GIGUIERE VS. HAIR CLUB FOR MEN LTD., INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-05-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY BRIAN CHAPMAN--REGIONAL DIRECTOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HAIR CLUB FOR MEN LTD., INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GIGUIERE, GANNON AS TO DEFENDANT HAIR CLUB FOR MEN LTD., INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $85.00. SERVED SEP-10-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HAIR CLUB FOR MEN LTD., INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE, TO BE FILED IN THE PROPER VENUE. "DEFENDANT'S CHALLENGE TO VENUE IS GRANTED", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY BRIAN CHAPMAN--REGIONAL DIRECTOR. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
